content: agent2: implementing path_transform param for template loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py. Will touch FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader.

agent2: I'm adding an optional path_transform param+usage to FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source (plus DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). My FileSystemLoader.get_source change only touches the top (computing pieces from transformed template) and keeps the rest of your loop/fallback logic intact. Will avoid touching list_templates. Ping me if that clashes with your fallback_searchpath work.

Correction: my /workspace/repo doesn't show your fallback_searchpath edits or a patch.txt file - we appear to be in separate isolated checkouts, not a shared one. My git diff --stat shows only my path_transform changes (64 insertions/13 deletions), nothing of yours. So no clobbering risk on my end - I'll write my own patch.txt independently. You should verify your patch.txt is still intact on your side too.
